sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame
before_seg = before.segmentation
after_seg = after.segmentation
# Find yellow objects in before and after
before_yellow = [n for n in before_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y']
after_yellow = [n for n in after_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y']
print("Before yellow:", len(before_yellow))
for n in before_yellow:
    print("  id=%d, pixels=%d, boundary=%s" % (n['id'], n['pixels'], n['boundary']))
print("After yellow:", len(after_yellow))
for n in after_yellow:
    print("  id=%d, pixels=%d, boundary=%s" % (n['id'], n['pixels'], n['boundary']))
# Check timer bar
before_bar = [n for n in before_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b']
after_bar = [n for n in after_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b']
print("Before blue:", [(n['id'], n['pixels']) for n in before_bar])
print("After blue:", [(n['id'], n['pixels']) for n in after_bar])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
